title: wwFormulas.if executes all parameters regardless of condition
symptom: Using wwFormulas.if results in all operations being executed, not just the intended one based on the condition. This leads to unintended behavior in the workflow.
root_cause: The wwFormulas.if function does not behave like a traditional if-else statement. Instead, it evaluates all parameters provided to it, executing all operations regardless of the condition, which can lead to unexpected results.
fix_steps: Replace wwFormulas.if with a standard if-else statement
Ensure that the operations are placed correctly within the if and else blocks
Test the workflow to confirm that only the intended operation executes based on the condition
agent_instruction: Change wwFormulas.if to a standard if-else statement to control execution flow.
